title: Bedrock Breaker!
description:
Adds a craftable pickaxe to the game that allows the player to break bedrock!

Better than the TNT Method!
body:
Breaks Bedrock with a right click (Right click & look at the block you want destroyed for approx 10 seconds)

Custom Crafting Recipe

Destroys itself after 7 uses (configurable)

takes 10 seoconds by defaault to mine (configurable)

 

Dont forget to downloads the resource pack, pack may not function correctly witout it!

 

Spawn the breaker: /function bedrock_breaker:spawn_breaker

Config:

Adjust the delay (200=10second delay, 100=5 second delay): /scoreboard players set delay bb_config 200

Adjust the max uses before the item breaks: /scoreboard players set max_uses bb_config 3

 

May work in other versions only tested in 1.21.10

Report any issues and they will be amended

 

NO YOU CANT REPACK THIS DATAPACK
